Name: LU 39 - Zoning, 20 Berry Street, Brooklyn (N 240272 ZRK).
Title: Application number N 240272 ZRK (20 Berry Street) submitted by Mihata Corp., pursuant to Section 201 of the New York City Charter, for an amendment of the Zoning Resolution of the City of New York, adding an Industrial Business Incentive Area to Article VII, Chapter 4 (Special Permits by the City Planning Commission), Borough of Brooklyn, Community District 1, Council District 33.

History.Description: This Resolution was Approved by Committee
